description: WHAT job is being done. Roles are job definitions. Model and destination assigned by orchestrator at runtime.

roles.name: Vibes
roles.description: Human consultation and project intelligence. Primary interface to VibePilot.
roles.notes: Sits above orchestrator. Human's primary interface.

roles.name: Orchestrator
roles.description: Strategic task routing. Routes based on availability, performance, costs. Gets smarter over time.
roles.notes: Strategic brain. Works with Researcher for continuous improvement.

roles.name: Researcher
roles.description: Monitors new models, platforms, approaches. Feeds intelligence to Orchestrator.
roles.notes: How VibePilot evolves. Weekly briefings to Vibes.

roles.name: Consultant
roles.description: Interactive PRD generation. Works with human to clarify vision and produce PRD.
roles.notes: Starts every project. Can use courier for free tier access.

roles.name: Planner
roles.description: Task breakdown and dependency mapping. Takes PRD and produces executable task graph.
roles.notes: Needs codebase access for accurate planning.

roles.name: Council
roles.description: Multi-perspective review. Architecture, security, maintenance perspectives.
roles.notes: Can approve, reject, or request changes.

roles.name: Supervisor
roles.description: Quality gate and merge control. Verifies output, handles pass/fail.
roles.notes: Quality gate. Orchestrator routes, Supervisor validates.

roles.name: Courier
roles.description: Web platform execution via browser automation. Returns result + chat_url.
roles.notes: No codebase access. Only receives task packet. TWO models involved: driver (browser-use) + destination (web platform).

roles.name: Internal CLI
roles.description: CLI-based execution with full codebase access.
roles.notes: For dependency-heavy tasks requiring codebase context.

roles.name: Internal API
roles.description: API-based execution. Has codebase access. Use sparingly.
roles.notes: API costs money. Gemini API is free. DeepSeek has credit.

roles.name: Code Tester
roles.description: Runs tests, lint, typecheck on generated code.
roles.notes: Uses OpenCode subscription. Fast and capable.

roles.name: Visual Tester
roles.description: Visual regression testing for UI. Uses browser automation to capture screenshots, compare to baseline, detect diffs.
roles.notes: Courier's sibling. Both use browser-use, but visual tester tests OUR app, not external platforms. Human review required for visual decisions.

roles.name: Maintenance
roles.description: ONLY role that touches system files. Implements after Council + Supervisor approval.
roles.notes: No approval = no change. Researcher suggests, Maintenance implements.

mcp_tasks.notes: Routes to user's connected IDE via MCP

notes: Roles define WHAT job, not WHO does it or WHERE.
Orchestrator assigns: role + destination + model at runtime.
Courier is unique: needs BOTH a driver model (browser-use) AND a web destination.
Visual Tester is Courier's sibling: same browser automation, but tests OUR app not external platforms.
All defaults are suggestions. Orchestrator can override based on availability/costs.
Subscription tracking lives in destinations.json, not here.
